name: teams-domain-store
description: Create TeamsDomain ArkType scope and createTeamsStore factory with enhancement hooks
acceptanceCriteria: All entity identifier fields use 'string.uuid' type for proper MST reference resolution
domain.ts exports TeamsDomain ArkType scope with Organization, Team, App, Membership, Invitation entities
Organization has: id, name, slug, ownerId, settings (object), createdAt, updatedAt
Team has: id, name, description, organization: 'Organization', parent: 'Team?', createdAt - uses entity reference not ID string
App has: id, name, slug, team: 'Team', settings (object), createdAt, updatedAt
Membership has: id, userId, organization: 'Organization?', team: 'Team?', app: 'App?', role, createdAt
Invitation has: id, email, inviterId, organization: 'Organization?', team: 'Team?', role, expiresAt, status, createdAt
domain.ts exports createTeamsStore() factory using createStoreFromScope
enhanceModels adds Membership.level computed (numeric role value for comparison)
enhanceRootStore adds initialize() that syncs from ITeamsService if available
enhanceRootStore adds resolvePermissions(userId, resourceType, resourceId) returning max role
resolvePermissions walks Org→Team→App chain collecting memberships with additive union
Store integrates with ITeamsService via getEnv<IEnvironment>(self).services.teams
Tests verify reference fields resolve to entity instances (not just ID strings)
Tests verify optional references return undefined when not set
